identities.name: Hybridization & Shape Prediction
identities.logic: VSEPR theory applied to Xenon fluorides and interhalogen compounds. Trap: Lone pair placement in Bent vs See-saw.

identities.name: Nernst Equation - pH dependence
identities.logic: Calculating E_cell when H+ concentration is varied. Linking Electrochemistry with Ionic Equilibrium.

identities.name: Named Organic Reactions - Yield Priority
identities.logic: Identifying primary products for Reimer-Tiemann, Kolbe's, and Williamson Synthesis. Focus on phenolic derivatives.

identities.name: Hard-Soft Acid Base (HSAB) basics
identities.logic: Predicting stability of complexes. Focus on F- vs I- ligand substitutions.

identities.name: Biomolecules - Linkage Types
identities.logic: Glycosidic vs Peptide vs Phosphodiester. Identifying the specific atoms involved in the bond (e.g., C1-C4).

traps.name: Enthalpy of Atomization
traps.description: Confusing standard enthalpy of formation with enthalpy of atomization for transition elements.

traps.name: Oxidation State vs Covalency
traps.description: Asking for 'Covalency' of Al in [Al(H2O)6]3+ vs its oxidation state.
